heading: Coordination requirements for plans providing prescription drug coverage
label: 1395w–134 Coordination requirements for plans providing prescription drug coverage

children.heading: Application of benefit coordination requirements to additional plans
children.label: a Application of benefit coordination requirements to additional plans

children.heading: In general
children.label: 1 In general
children.text: The Secretary shall apply the coordination requirements established under to Rx plans described in subsection (b) in the same manner as such requirements apply to a State Pharmaceutical Assistance Program.section 1395w–133(a) of this title

children.heading: Application to treatment of certain out-of-pocket expenditures
children.label: 2 Application to treatment of certain out-of-pocket expenditures
children.text: To the extent specified by the Secretary, the requirements referred to in paragraph (1) shall apply to procedures established under .section 1395w–102(b)(4)(D) of this title

children.heading: In general
children.label: A In general
children.text: The Secretary may impose user fees for the transmittal of information necessary for benefit coordination under in a manner similar to the manner in which user fees are imposed under , except that the Secretary may retain a portion of such fees to defray the Secretary’s costs in carrying out procedures under .section 1395w–102(b)(4)(D) of this titlesection 1395u(h)(3)(B) of this titlesection 1395w–102(b)(4)(D) of this title

children.heading: Application
children.label: B Application
children.text: A user fee may not be imposed under subparagraph (A) with respect to a State Pharmaceutical Assistance Program.

children.heading: Medicaid programs
children.label: 1 Medicaid programs
children.text: A State plan under subchapter XIX, including such a plan operating under a waiver under , if it meets the requirements of .section 1315 of this titlesection 1395w–133(b)(2) of this title

children.heading: FEHBP
children.label: 3 FEHBP
children.text: The Federal employees health benefits plan under chapter 89 of title 5.

children.heading: Other prescription drug coverage
children.label: 5 Other prescription drug coverage
children.text: Such other health benefit plans or programs that provide coverage or financial assistance for the purchase or provision of prescription drug coverage on behalf of part D eligible individuals as the Secretary may specify.

children.heading: Use of cost management tools
children.label: 1 Use of cost management tools
children.text: The requirements of this section shall not impair or prevent a PDP sponsor or MA organization from applying cost management tools (including differential payments) under all methods of operation.

children.heading: No affect on treatment of certain out-of-pocket expenditures1So in original. Probably should be “effect”.1
children.label: 2 No affect on treatment of certain out-of-pocket expenditures1So in original. Probably should be “effect”.1
children.text: The requirements of this section shall not affect the application of the procedures established under .section 1395w–102(b)(4)(D) of this title
